collections.name: Monochrome Moods
collections.tagline: Black and white photography, at its best.
collections.description: Monochrome Moods is black and white photography at its best — it plays between the contrasts of light and dark, finds the farthest edges between them, and puts them in one image. Not only stripping a photo to its essence, but finding a new truth.
collections.meta_description: Monochrome Moods — black and white photography that plays the contrasts of light and dark, finding the farthest edges and putting them in one image.

collections.name: The Signature Collection
collections.description: The Signature Collection is architecture as the clear subject of the frame. Old and new, from inside and from across a square — whatever distance the building is at, the building is what the photograph is about.
collections.meta_description: The Signature Collection — architectural photography where the building is the clear subject of the frame, from facade detail to landmark-through-context.

collections.name: The Atmospheric Collection
collections.tagline: Sense of place, urban and natural.
collections.description: The Atmospheric Collection is photography about the feeling of a place. Urban or natural, quiet or weighted — the subject is the mood the scene carries, not the thing in front of the lens.
collections.meta_description: The Atmospheric Collection — photography about the feeling of a place, urban or natural, where the mood of the scene is the subject, not the things in it.

collections.name: The Halcyon Collection
collections.description: The Halcyon Collection is photography under a warm grade — pink through peach into gold, with lavender in the shadows. A softer register, and a deliberate step away from accurate colour.
collections.meta_description: The Halcyon Collection — photography under a warm grade, pink through peach into gold with lavender in the shadows. A softer, deliberately graded register.
